ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency effectively.

the response is highly relevant, consistent with the persona of a Temple Priest who values ethical considerations and guidance; it's natural-sounding dialogue that maintains respect for temple practices while addressing urgent needs. The overall quality stands out due to its balance in all aspects requested by the player input.
